name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Fort Worth, TX is home to Western Union Money Order Only at 4150 Bryant Irvin Rd, providing round-the-clock money order services.
description_long:
Located at 4150 Bryant Irvin Rd in Fort Worth, TX, Western Union Money Order Only is a standalone check-cashing and money order service center. The location operates 24 hours every day of the week, making it convenient for Fort Worth residents and business owners needing urgent financial services at any time. Whether early morning, late night, or holiday, this facility serves the community around Bryant Irvin Rd.

This Western Union Money Order Only location specializes in money order sales, check cashing, and related payment services. For specific questions about current rates, accepted payment methods, or account requirements, customers can call +1 817-737-8948. The staff at this Fort Worth branch is trained to handle various transaction types quickly and securely.

When you need to send money or cash a check in Fort Worth, bring a valid government-issued ID—most transactions require one. Western Union Money Order Only makes it simple to complete your financial needs without an account or credit check. This location has been serving Fort Worth's community with dependable money order and check-cashing services.
address: 4150 Bryant Irvin Rd, Fort Worth, TX 76109

company_info.headquarters: 4150 Bryant Irvin Rd, Fort Worth, TX 76109

pros: Massive physical network: hundreds of US agent locations including Walmart, grocery chains, and retail stores
Hybrid flexibility: register transfers online/via app and pay in cash at agent locations to save in-store time
Multiple service options: money transfers, money orders, bill payments, cash pickup, and prepaid card funding all in one network
International coverage with currency conversion at time of transfer
No minimum balance or credit check required for prepaid card option
First online international money transfer is fee-free
170+ year track record since 1851 with encryption and fraud prevention measures
Accept multiple payment methods: cash, debit card, and credit card at select locations
cons: Fees and exchange rates not transparently listed on website—must use calculator or visit location for pricing
Hours vary by agent location with no standardized operating times
No currency exchange services available in person despite international transfer offering
Entirely dependent on retail partner availability; service access varies by geographic location
Website content cuts off mid-sentence regarding credit card acceptance, suggesting incomplete or outdated information
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need in-person money transfer without a bank account
People sending money internationally to family or friends and wanting immediate service
Consumers who prefer paying cash and value physical accessibility over online-only services
People needing to purchase and cash money orders as an alternative to checks
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need fast, in-person access to money transfer services and value physical location convenience over the lowest possible fees. The main caveat is that actual costs are not transparently disclosed upfront—customers must use an online calculator or visit a location to comparison shop, and fees/rates vary significantly by transfer type, payment method, and destination.
services: International money transfers with currency conversion
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments)
Western Union Prepaid Visa Card funding
Online transfer registration with in-person cash payment
